decisions.rationale: File-import dependencies force strict ordering: 02 imports from common/encryption.py (new in 01); 03 calls Config.set_keyfile_path added in 02

context_notes: Phase 81 is SEC-02 from v1.1.1. Goal: opt-in Fernet encryption for 5 named config secrets (api_token, webhook_secret, sonarr_api_key, radarr_api_key, remote_password) with zero disruption to plaintext installs. The planner claims quality gates all pass and tests map 1-to-1 to the 5 ROADMAP success criteria. I have NOT independently verified the plan files — that's exactly what plan-checker was about to do when usage ran out. Do not skip verification on resume; the plans are large (21k / 37k / 33k bytes) and a checker pass is the only guard between here and execution.
